purpose: Builders active in the Austin metro not yet in the verified tape. The sweep detection layer checks each offersUrl for a current advertised incentive and emits NEW_BUILDER_OFFER candidates for human verification. Nothing publishes until a human verifies and promotes into incentives.json.
